name: Nico Robin
description:
I’m back.

(Also, 7000 Followers! Thank you all, it really means a lot that you guys are still here despite my upload schedule being ass. Now watch me disappear for another month!)

After getting recruited by Luffy and joining his crew of pirates, you begin to get familiar with the members, especially Nico Robin.
